summary: Checked the weak-pi pODMR refinement bridge job; it remains running in phase run_experiment_scan_point at runtime average index 4 with Final = 43.649 kcps, stop_requested=false, and no terminal/anomaly evidence. Performed bridge-free 3-average autosave review: raw export, scan-order-aware drift diagnostic, figure, and Gaussian-dip fit. The provisional autosave shows a narrow signal-only dip near the prior strong-pi center (fit center about 3.876493370 GHz, depth about 11.7%, FWHM about 0.87 MHz; nearest sampled point 3.876461010 GHz has about 10.24% signal depression vs about 0.84% reference depression) with no drift flags. Updated work/state.md, wrote a note, recorded evidence, and logged the figure. No queue mutation or new bridge submission was performed.

next_action.reason: Bridge-touching work is blocked while the weak-pi pODMR refinement is running; terminal weak-pi data are needed before fixing the next Ramsey mw_freq.
next_action.on_terminal_success: Raw-export terminal savedexperiment, plot raw/readout-aware views, run drift diagnostic, fit/review weak-pi resonance center, then design a claim-grade repeat Ramsey/T2star/13C test around the refined center after verifier/advisory/queue gates.
next_action.on_terminal_failure: Distinguish count/tracking freshness from route/hardware/code failure before retrying or changing the Ramsey design.
